initialValue:
name: Promote Orders API
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      commit:
        description: Commit sha to release
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      image_tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.image_tag }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test
      - run: docker build -t orders-api:${{ inputs.commit }} .
      - id: meta
        run: echo "image_tag=orders-api:${{ inputs.commit }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
      - id: digest
        run: echo "image_digest=sha256:9c1cfbb322f6f2b8f8cc4d2b9f9e6b77c92c8da7ad9226110f0cf0c30a2a7f54" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: staging
    steps:
      - run: ./scripts/deploy-ecs.sh orders-api-staging "${{ needs.build.outputs.image_tag }}"
      - run: ./scripts/smoke.sh https://orders-api-staging.devpolaris.example

  deploy-production:
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: npm ci && npm test && docker build -t orders-api:${{ github.sha }} .
      - run: ./scripts/deploy-ecs.sh orders-api-prod "orders-api:${{ github.sha }}"

expected.label: build exposes image_digest from the digest step
production depends on build and staging
production deploys the same build digest
